headings: GSC Birchway Commerce City Project No. c20-849
text: The undersigned certifies that, except as specifically stated above, no other sums are claimed, and that Supplier's laborers, subcontractors and suppliers that have performed or furnished any work for the Project have been paid in full or will be paid in full out of this payment and that none of such laborers, subcontractors or suppliers is or will be entitled to claim or assert any lien or other claim against Subcontractor, Contractor, Owner, the Project, or the Property for labor, services, equipment or materials furnished to or for Supplier's account. Before any recipient of this document relies on it, said party should verify evidence of payment to Supplier.
